title: The Doppelganger 2
body:
This mod is based on the legend of the doppelganger, a creature that replaces people's place by stealing their appearance and imitating their behavior.

-----------------------

Mobs:

- Doppelganger

- Disguised cow

- Disguised pig

- Disguised chicken

- Disguised wolf

- Disguised spider

- Disguised bee
-----------------------



Use of the mod in modpacks authorized.
